title: ebenus longipes subsp. argentea
intro: Ebenus longipes subsp. argentea, also known as the silver euphoria or silver spurge, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help in wound healing and reducing pain. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Ebenus longipes subsp. argentea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal use, and it is often used in traditional herbal remedies, particularly in Middle Eastern and Asian cultures.
